description_long: This is a modern civilian helicopter with a streamlined, aerodynamic fuselage painted in a deep blue color. The helicopter features a large, tinted cockpit with multiple angular windows, providing wide visibility for the pilot and passengers. Its main rotor consists of two long, slender blades, while the tail boom extends to a small tail rotor with two blades, both painted black. The landing gear consists of two sturdy, parallel skids attached to the underside of the fuselage, designed for stable ground contact. The helicopter's body appears to be constructed primarily from lightweight metal alloys and composite materials, with visible seams and panel lines. No visible registration numbers or markings are present on the exterior.
description: A sleek blue civilian helicopter with a large tinted cockpit, two-blade main and tail rotors, and sturdy landing skids. The body is streamlined and modern, with no visible registration markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, angular cockpit windows, the nose, and the symmetrical landing skids.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, main and tail rotors, and the full length of the landing skids.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail boom, tail rotor, and the parallel alignment of the landing skids.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the cockpit profile, main rotor, and tail structure.
attribute_rotor_blades: Two long, narrow main rotor blades, black in color, with a straight shape and no visible markings. The blades appear to be made of composite material.
attribute_tail_rotor: Two-blade tail rotor mounted vertically at the end of the tail boom, black in color, with no visible markings or protective shroud.
attribute_landing_skids: Two parallel, tubular landing skids made of metal, painted blue to match the fuselage, with simple crossbar supports and no visible footpads.
attribute_cockpit_windows: Four large, angular cockpit windows arranged in a wraparound configuration, tinted dark, with thin black framing and no visible markings.
